name: Noncombatant
official_rules_text: A miniature with the Noncombatant keyword cannot add any weapons to Attack Pools, and any Wounds suffered must be assigned to non-unit leader miniatures without the Noncombatant keyword, if able. If a miniature with the Noncombatant keyword already has 1 or more Wound tokens, it must be assigned Wounds before miniatures that do not have Wound tokens. If the unit leader miniature in a unit with the Noncombatant keyword is defeated, a Noncombatant miniature cannot be replaced by a new unit leader miniature unless there are no other miniatures without the Noncombatant keyword.UPGRADE AND
